title: Windows Server 2019
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
Hello, I'm trying to run Podman on Windows Server 2019 v 1809, with WSL installed, when I run podman machine init it says I need windows 10 Build 19041 or later. I think this is probably the result of an OS check when I run the command, is there a way to bypass it as I do have WSL on this windows server.

comments.body:
According to this https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/d729dd8c2e6556de10c4543c018fbebffa265a5e/contrib/cirrus/win-installer-main.ps1#L48

You can try to run from command line `podman-setup.exe AllowOldWin=1` to bypass that check in the installer. But I'm not sure if Windows Server 2019 is in the list of officially supported platforms.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
